reason: The remediation only edits /etc/postfix/main.cf to set smtpd_client_restrictions, which limits which clients can relay mail. This does not affect system authentication, SSH, or boot processes, and follows standard STIG guidance for mail server hardening. The change is reversible and unlikely to lock out administrators.
estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; Potential disruption of legitimate remote mail clients if mynetworks is not properly defined; Mail service restart may cause brief downtime
